name: ICS Protocol Violation Detected
description: Detects malformed or invalid ICS protocol messages indicating attack or malfunction
query:
// ICS Protocol Violation Detection (NDR)
// Malformed packets or protocol violations
events from ndr_flow
where protocol in ("modbus", "dnp3", "bacnet", "opcua", "enip", "iec104")
  and (alert_type = "protocol_violation" or parse_error = true)
group by source_ip, destination_ip, protocol
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
